title: Perfectionism Pattern Log
description: Track perfectionism episodes to identify your patterns, triggers, and the impact of rigid standards on your daily life.
instructions: When you notice a perfectionism pattern in action — such as overworking, checking excessively, procrastinating due to fear of imperfection, or being harsh with yourself — record the episode here.

fields.label: What was the situation?
fields.placeholder: e.g., Preparing a report for work, cooking dinner for guests

fields.label: What perfectionistic rule was activated?
fields.placeholder: e.g., 'This report must be flawless or my boss will think I'm incompetent'

fields.label: What did you do in response?

options.label: Overworked or spent excessive time on the task
Gave up or abandoned the task
Tried to control how others did things

fields.label: How distressed did you feel? (0 = no distress, 10 = extreme distress)
How much extra time did this pattern cost you?
What actually happened? (Did the feared outcome occur?)
fields.placeholder: e.g., 'The report was fine. My boss said it was good. Nobody noticed the section I was worried about.'

fields.label: Any other observations or reflections
fields.placeholder: e.g., 'I noticed the perfectionism was stronger when I was tired. The actual outcome was much better than I feared.'

disclaimer: This log is an educational self-tracking tool. It is not a diagnostic instrument or a substitute for professional mental health care. Please avoid including names or other identifying information in your entries.
